Title: Approval Plugin Infrastructure
Description: Establish foundational plugin scaffold for the WebVella ERP Approval Workflow system. Creates the core ApprovalPlugin class inheriting from ErpPlugin base class, implements the ProcessPatches() migration orchestration pattern for entity schema versioning, and configures the SetSchedulePlans() method for background job registration. This story provides the architectural foundation that all subsequent approval workflow stories depend upon.
Business Value: Extensibility and modularity through plugin architecture; Enables independent deployment and versioning; Establishes consistent patterns for future approval features; Provides migration framework for database schema evolution
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] ApprovalPlugin.cs created with correct ErpPlugin inheritance and Initialize() method; [ ] ProcessPatches() method orchestrates migration patches by date; [ ] SetSchedulePlans() method registers notification and escalation jobs; [ ] PluginSettings.cs model created for plugin configuration; [ ] Plugin correctly registers with WebVella ERP service discovery
Technical Details: Files: WebVella.Erp.Plugins.Approval/ApprovalPlugin.cs, ApprovalPlugin._.cs, Model/PluginSettings.cs; Key Classes: ApprovalPlugin : ErpPlugin; Key Methods: Initialize(), ProcessPatches(), SetSchedulePlans()

Title: Approval Entity Schema
Description: Create the five core entities that form the data model for the approval workflow system: approval_workflow (workflow definitions), approval_step (steps within workflows), approval_rule (routing rules), approval_request (active approval instances), and approval_history (audit trail). Implements entity relations including OneToMany from workflow to steps/rules and from request to history. Creates migration patch ApprovalPlugin.20260115.cs following WebVella's dated migration pattern.
Business Value: Persistent storage for workflow configurations; Relational data model enabling complex approval hierarchies; Audit trail for compliance and traceability; Flexible schema supporting multiple workflow types
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] approval_workflow entity created with fields: id, name, target_entity, is_enabled, created_on, created_by; [ ] approval_step entity created with fields: id, workflow_id, step_order, approver_type, threshold_config, timeout_hours; [ ] approval_rule entity created with fields: id, workflow_id, field_name, operator, threshold_value, next_step_id; [ ] approval_request entity created with fields: id, source_record_id, source_entity, workflow_id, current_step_id, status, created_on, created_by; [ ] approval_history entity created with fields: id, request_id, action_type, performed_by, performed_on, comments, previous_status, new_status
Technical Details: Files: WebVella.Erp.Plugins.Approval/ApprovalPlugin.20260115.cs; Entities: approval_workflow, approval_step, approval_rule, approval_request, approval_history; Relations: OneToMany (workflow->steps, workflow->rules, request->history)
Labels: workflow, approval, backend, database, entities, migration

Title: Workflow Configuration Management
Description: Implement configuration services for managing approval workflow definitions including WorkflowConfigService for workflow CRUD, StepConfigService for approval step management, and RuleConfigService for routing rule configuration. Includes validation logic for threshold ordering, circular dependency detection, and approver role validation. All services inherit from BaseApprovalService pattern.
Business Value: Administrative flexibility for workflow configuration without code changes; Validation prevents misconfigured workflows; Self-service workflow management reduces IT dependency; Supports multiple concurrent workflow configurations
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] WorkflowConfigService implements CreateWorkflow(), GetWorkflow(), UpdateWorkflow(), DeleteWorkflow() methods; [ ] StepConfigService validates step ordering and prevents gaps; [ ] RuleConfigService validates threshold ranges don't overlap; [ ] BaseApprovalService provides common manager injection pattern; [ ] EQL queries efficiently retrieve workflows with related steps and rules
Technical Details: Files: Services/WorkflowConfigService.cs, Services/StepConfigService.cs, Services/RuleConfigService.cs, Services/BaseApprovalService.cs; Integration: RecordManager, EntityManager, EqlCommand for data operations

Title: Approval Service Layer
Description: Implement core business logic services for approval runtime operations: ApprovalWorkflowService for workflow lifecycle management, ApprovalRouteService for routing evaluation and step progression, ApprovalRequestService for request state management (approve/reject/delegate), and ApprovalHistoryService for audit trail logging. Services integrate with SecurityContext for permission validation.
Business Value: Encapsulated business rules enable consistent approval processing; Service layer decouples API from implementation; Supports complex routing scenarios with threshold-based decisions; Comprehensive audit logging for compliance
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] ApprovalWorkflowService.CreateWorkflow() initializes workflow with validation; [ ] ApprovalRouteService.EvaluateNextStep() determines next approval step based on rules; [ ] ApprovalRouteService.GetApproversForStep() resolves approver users for a step; [ ] ApprovalRequestService.ApproveRequest() validates authority and advances workflow; [ ] ApprovalRequestService.RejectRequest() transitions to rejected state with logging; [ ] ApprovalHistoryService.LogApprovalAction() creates audit trail records
Technical Details: Files: Services/ApprovalWorkflowService.cs, Services/ApprovalRouteService.cs, Services/ApprovalRequestService.cs, Services/ApprovalHistoryService.cs; Integration: SecurityContext, RecordManager, EqlCommand

Title: Approval Hooks Integration
Description: Implement pre/post record hooks for approval workflow event processing: ApprovalRequestCreateHook (IErpPreCreateRecordHook) for initializing workflow routing on request creation, ApprovalRequestUpdateHook (IErpPostUpdateRecordHook) for triggering notifications on state changes, and target entity hooks (PurchaseOrderApproval, ExpenseRequestApproval) for initiating approval workflows when records are created. Uses HookAttachmentAttribute for entity binding.
Business Value: Automated workflow triggering without manual intervention; Event-driven architecture enables real-time processing; Consistent hook patterns across all approval entities; Extensible framework for additional target entities
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] ApprovalRequestCreateHook validates required fields and initializes routing; [ ] ApprovalRequestUpdateHook triggers notification queue on status change; [ ] PurchaseOrderApproval hook initiates approval workflow on PO creation; [ ] ExpenseRequestApproval hook initiates approval workflow on expense creation; [ ] All hooks use HookAttachmentAttribute with correct entity keys
Technical Details: Files: Hooks/Api/ApprovalRequest.cs, Hooks/Api/PurchaseOrderApproval.cs, Hooks/Api/ExpenseRequestApproval.cs; Interfaces: IErpPreCreateRecordHook, IErpPostUpdateRecordHook; Integration: ApprovalRouteService, ApprovalHistoryService

Title: Notification and Escalation Background Jobs
Description: Implement scheduled background jobs for approval workflow automation: ProcessApprovalNotificationsJob (5-minute interval) for sending pending approval notifications via SMTP, ProcessApprovalEscalationsJob (30-minute interval) for escalating overdue requests based on timeout_hours, and CleanupExpiredApprovalsJob (daily at 2 AM) for archiving completed requests older than retention period. Jobs integrate with Mail plugin for email delivery.
Business Value: Automated reminders improve approval response times; SLA enforcement through timeout-based escalation; Database maintenance through automated archival; Email integration leverages existing Mail plugin infrastructure
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] ProcessApprovalNotificationsJob queries pending requests and sends emails via SmtpInternalService; [ ] ProcessApprovalEscalationsJob checks timeout_hours and escalates overdue requests; [ ] CleanupExpiredApprovalsJob archives completed requests older than RETENTION_DAYS; [ ] SetSchedulePlans() in ApprovalPlugin registers all three job schedules; [ ] Jobs use SecurityContext.OpenSystemScope() for system-level operations
Technical Details: Files: Jobs/ProcessApprovalNotificationsJob.cs, Jobs/ProcessApprovalEscalationsJob.cs, Jobs/CleanupExpiredApprovalsJob.cs; Integration: ScheduleManager, JobManager, SmtpInternalService, ApprovalRouteService, ApprovalHistoryService
Labels: workflow, approval, backend, jobs, notifications, background-processing, email-integration, escalation, cleanup

Title: Approval REST API Endpoints
Description: Implement REST API layer through ApprovalController with endpoints for: workflow CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/v3.0/p/approval/workflow), request actions (POST /approve, /reject, /delegate), and queries (GET /pending, /request/{id}, /request/{id}/history). Controller uses [Authorize] attribute for authentication, returns ResponseModel envelope for all responses, and delegates business logic to service layer.
Business Value: External integration capability for third-party systems; UI consumption layer for approval components; Standardized API contracts simplify client development; Centralized security enforcement at API layer
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] GET /api/v3.0/p/approval/workflow returns workflow list with optional entity filter; [ ] POST /api/v3.0/p/approval/workflow creates new workflow with validation; [ ] POST /api/v3.0/p/approval/request/{id}/approve processes approval with comments; [ ] POST /api/v3.0/p/approval/request/{id}/reject processes rejection with comments; [ ] POST /api/v3.0/p/approval/request/{id}/delegate reassigns to specified user; [ ] GET /api/v3.0/p/approval/pending returns current user's pending approvals with pagination
Technical Details: Files: Controllers/ApprovalController.cs, Api/CreateWorkflowModel.cs, Api/UpdateWorkflowModel.cs, Api/ApproveRequestModel.cs, Api/DelegateRequestModel.cs; Integration: ApprovalWorkflowService, ApprovalRequestService, ApprovalHistoryService, SecurityContext

Title: Approval UI Page Components
Description: Implement four page components for approval workflow user interface: PcApprovalWorkflowConfig (admin configuration for workflows), PcApprovalRequestList (dashboard for pending/submitted requests), PcApprovalAction (approve/reject/delegate buttons), and PcApprovalHistory (audit timeline display). Each component follows WebVella PageComponent pattern with Design, Display, Options, Help, Error views and service.js for API consumption.
Business Value: User-friendly configuration interface reduces technical barriers; Efficient approval processing through centralized dashboard; Transparency through complete audit history display; Customizable page integration via page builder; Consistent UX following WebVella component patterns
Acceptance Criteria: [ ] PcApprovalWorkflowConfig renders workflow form with entity dropdown and save/delete actions; [ ] PcApprovalRequestList displays paginated table with inline approve/reject buttons; [ ] PcApprovalAction renders action buttons that call REST API with confirmation dialogs; [ ] PcApprovalHistory renders timeline view with color-coded action indicators; [ ] All components register in page builder under "Approval Workflow" category; [ ] service.js files implement AJAX calls with toastr notifications for feedback
Technical Details: Files: Components/PcApprovalWorkflowConfig/, Components/PcApprovalRequestList/, Components/PcApprovalAction/, Components/PcApprovalHistory/ (each with .cs, Design.cshtml, Display.cshtml, Options.cshtml, Help.cshtml, Error.cshtml, service.js); Integration: ApprovalController REST API endpoints
